title: A round gray UFO remained static then went off vertically and disappeared [2002]

text_preview: APRIL 1st, 2002. Time: 15h15pm. Duration: 10 minutes. When an airline pilot and another witness were about 110NM [nautical miles] – 203.7 km – from the International Airport of Foz do Iguaçu, State of Paraná, at an altitude of 9,000ft, they saw a round gray unidentified flying object. According to the witnesses the UFO was static at an altitude of 8,000ft, and approximately 30NM – 55.4 km – away from the plane. Even under non-ideal conditions of visibility and operating by IFR (Instrument Flight Rules), the pilot could specify the “11 o’clock” position of the object in relation to his plane, a
summary: An airline pilot near Foz do Iguaçu airport observed a static round gray UFO at 8,000ft that then ascended vertically until it disappeared on 1 April 2002.
